---
name: Propose a Chapter Author
about: Volunteer to write or co-write a chapter
title: "[CHAPTER AUTHOR] Chapter X: [Chapter title]"
labels: chapter-author
assignees: ''
---

## Chapter
Which chapter are you proposing to write? See the full list at democracyproject2028.org/framework

## Your Expertise
Describe your relevant background, credentials, or experience.

## Your Approach
How would you approach this chapter? Any particular angles, sources, or perspectives you'd prioritize?

## Affiliations
Please disclose any institutional affiliations, funding sources, or potential conflicts of interest.

## Timeline
How long would you need to produce a first draft?

## Samples
Optional: Link to relevant writing samples.
